div1.entryFree:
Inheritor, 1) heir: Sonn. 146, 7. H4B IV, 5, 169. Troil. IV, 1, 64. Per. I, 4, 64.
2) possessor, owner: the sole i. of all perfections that a man may owe, LLL II, 5. be i. of thy desire, R3 IV, 3, 34. the very conveyances of his lands will hardly lie in this box, and must the i. himself have no more? Hml. V, 1, 121.
